caption: The video features a lecture on cryogenic engineering, specifically focusing on the concept of Figure of Merit (FOM). The speaker, Prof. M.D. Atrey from the Department of Mechanical Engineering at IIT Bombay, is seen explaining how the ideal cycle serves as a benchmark for comparing various liquefaction systems. He is dressed in a formal suit and is seated in front of a colorful background that includes abstract designs and possibly scientific imagery. The presentation appears to be part of an educational series, likely aimed at students or professionals in the field of mechanical engineering. The professor's demeanor suggests he is engaged in delivering detailed and technical information, emphasizing the importance of understanding FOM in the context of cryogenic processes.
